mapper.select: SELECT md.id, md.public_id::text AS publicKey, md.module_id AS moduleId, m.public_id::text AS modulePublicKey, md.code, md.name, md.name_other AS nameOther, md.type, md.action_key AS actionKey, md.display_order AS displayOrder, FALSE AS checked FROM module_details md JOIN modules m ON m.id = md.module_id WHERE md.is_active = 1 AND m.module_type_id = #{moduleTypeId} ORDER BY md.display_order, md.id
